title: Headcount Planning at Scale: What Changes When You Hit 200 Employees
excerpt: Below 200 employees, headcount planning is basically a list. Above 200, the whole job changes — and most FP&A teams don't see the shift coming until they're already behind.

title: Reasonable vs Defensible vs Probability-Weighted Forecasts
excerpt: A forecast that looks reasonable is only the starting point. Strong FP&A teams push further by making assumptions defensible and ultimately building probability-weighted scenarios that show leadership the real range of outcomes.

title: Six Things McKinsey Learned from a Year of Agentic AI (That Matter for FP&A)
excerpt: McKinsey analyzed 50+ agentic AI builds and distilled six lessons. Here's the FP&A-specific read on each one.
